channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pep Guardiola to step down as Manchester City manager after decade of success
item.description: Pep Guardiola has confirmed he will leave Manchester City at the end of the season, ending a remarkable ten-year tenure that saw him transform the club into a European powerhouse. The 55-year-old Cata...

item.title: Kenya must tackle knife gangs and youth violence urgently
item.description: Knife attacks have become a serious problem across Kenya, affecting towns, slums, and even political gatherings. Gangs armed with knives and machetes are causing terror in at least 22 counties. Cities...

item.title: Strictly Come Dancing unveils new presenting team at Chelsea Flower Show
item.description: The new presenting team for BBC's Strictly Come Dancing made their first public appearance together at the prestigious RHS Chelsea Flower Show in London on Friday. Emma Willis, Josh Widdicombe, and Jo...

item.title: TNT evaluates Marquese Chriss and Darius Days as potential PBA replacement import
item.description: TNT Tropang Giga, one of the leading teams in the Philippine Basketball Association (PBA), is exploring options to secure a replacement import amid the ongoing PBA season. The management is reportedly...

item.title: Political analyst comments on President Trump's confusion during press briefing
item.description: During a press briefing ahead of the Coast Guard Academy commencement address, President Donald Trump appeared visibly confused while responding to reporters' questions, drawing attention from politic...

item.title: Auguste Toulmouche and His Portrayal of 19th-Century Parisian Women
item.description: Auguste Toulmouche (1829–1890) was a leading French Academic Realist painter celebrated for his detailed genre paintings depicting upper-middle-class women in 19th-century Paris. A student of Charles ...

item.title: Weekly Summary of Key Developments in the Trump Administration
item.description: This week, several significant developments took place under President Donald Trump's administration, reflecting ongoing economic and political trends in the United States. Americans’ confidence in th...

item.title: Mixed-breed dog safely rescued from steep Hermanus cliff
item.description: A mixed-breed dog was rescued from a near-vertical cliff face at Dreunkrans in Hermanus after a passing walker alerted authorities. The animal, whose owners have not yet been traced, was spotted cling...

item.title: Angela White’s past and present relationships and family life
item.description: Angela Renee White, better known as Blac Chyna, is an American model, rapper, TV personality, actress, businesswoman, and socialite. Born on May 11, 1988, in Washington, D.C., she has five siblings an...

item.title: GSIS reports significant net income growth in Q1 2026
item.description: The Government Service Insurance System (GSIS) reported a remarkable increase in its net income, reaching P43.6 billion in the first quarter of 2026. This figure demonstrates a strong financial perfor...

item.title: Australia and the Philippines Mark 80 Years of Diplomatic Relations Through Quezon Memorial and Strengthened Defense Cooperation
item.description: Australia and the Philippines recently celebrated 80 years of strong bilateral ties through a series of events highlighted by memorial rites for former President Manuel L. Quezon. The activities empha...

item.title: Congo football team must quarantine in Belgium before US World Cup amid Ebola outbreak
item.description: The Congolese national football team has been instructed to remain in a strict isolation 'bubble' in Belgium for 21 days prior to travelling to the United States for this summer's World Cup. This meas...

item.title: Nankai University Researchers Reveal Geometric Boundary Mechanism Connecting Entanglement to EPR Steering in Two-Qubit Systems
item.description: Scientists at Nankai University, collaborating with the Chern Institute of Mathematics, have made a significant advancement in understanding the relationship between quantum entanglement and Einstein-...

item.title: Trump Cancels Memorial Day Weekend Golf Trip Amid Rising Tensions with Iran
item.description: President Donald Trump unexpectedly cancelled his planned golf trip to Bedminster, New Jersey, over the Memorial Day Weekend, citing urgent 'government circumstances' that required his presence at the...

item.title: California awarded $27.5 million in federal funding to replace lead water pipes
item.description: California has been allocated $27.5 million in federal funding to identify and replace lead service lines that supply water to homes, the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) announced. The fund...

item.title: Lower Levels of Active Vitamin B12 in Older Adults May Affect Brain Health Despite 'Normal' Lab Results
item.description: A recent study led by researchers at the University of California, San Francisco, suggests that older adults with vitamin B12 levels considered 'normal' may still face hidden risks to brain health. Th...

item.title: Tanzania Outlines 7 Key Priorities to Boost Industry and Private Sector in 2026/27
item.description: Tanzania’s Minister for Industry and Trade, Hon. Judith Kapinga, has presented seven strategic priorities for the 2026/2027 financial year focusing on industrial growth, private sector development, an...

item.title: Dow Jones climbs to new record as Kevin Warsh takes office as Federal Reserve chairman
item.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average reached a fresh record high, closing at 50,579.70, driven largely by strong gains in Merck and Salesforce shares. Earlier in the day, the index peaked at 50...

item.title: B.C. Nurses Reach Tentative Agreement with Province, Avoiding Job Action
item.description: British Columbia nurses have successfully reached a tentative agreement with the provincial government, averting potential job action after months of stalled contract negotiations. Earlier in May, the...

item.title: Kevin Gates and his siblings: Family background and careers
item.description: Kevin Jerome Gilyard, better known as Kevin Gates, is a renowned American rapper, singer, songwriter, and entrepreneur born in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, on 5 February 1986. He grew up with two younger s...
